title: Working from Home for the First Week

all.en: On Monday morning, I set up a tiny office at the corner of my dining table.
all.zh: 星期一早上，我在餐桌一角設置了一個小型辦公空間。

all.en: My cat decided that my laptop keyboard was the most comfortable place to nap.
all.zh: 我的貓認定我的筆電鍵盤是最舒服的午睡地點。

all.en: I joined my first video meeting and accidentally left my microphone muted.
all.zh: 我參加了第一場視訊會議，卻不小心忘了打開麥克風。

all.en: My boss laughed kindly and reminded everyone to check their settings.
all.zh: 老闆友善地笑了笑，提醒大家檢查自己的設定。

all.en: Without a commute, I had extra time to make a real breakfast every morning.
all.zh: 少了通勤時間，我每天早上都有空做一頓像樣的早餐。

all.en: On Wednesday, I almost forgot what day it was because everything blended together.
all.zh: 星期三那天，我幾乎忘記是禮拜幾，因為每一天都混在一起了。

all.en: I struggled to separate work hours from personal life within the same four walls.
all.zh: 在同樣的四面牆裡，我很難把工作時間和私人生活分開。

all.en: My back started aching from the wooden chair, so I bought a cushion online.
all.zh: 我的背因為坐木椅而開始痠痛，所以上網買了一個坐墊。

all.en: By Friday, I had developed a simple routine, including short walks in the afternoon.
all.zh: 到了星期五，我已建立起簡單的作息，包括下午的短時間散步。

all.en: Video calls with the team made me feel connected, though I missed the casual chats.
all.zh: 與團隊的視訊通話讓我覺得有所連結，但我仍懷念那種隨興的閒聊。

all.en: By the weekend, I realized working from home suited me better than I had thought.
all.zh: 到了週末，我發覺在家工作其實比我原本想像的還適合自己。

all.en: By the second Monday, I had moved my workspace from the dining table to a proper desk.
all.zh: 到了第二個星期一，我把工作區從餐桌搬到了正式的書桌。

all.en: I bought a wireless headset that made long video meetings much more comfortable.
all.zh: 我買了一副無線耳機，讓長時間的視訊會議舒適許多。

all.en: My cat slowly learned to nap somewhere else, though she still demanded attention at noon.
all.zh: 我的貓慢慢學會去別的地方睡午覺，雖然中午仍要求我陪她。

all.en: I scheduled lunch breaks away from the screen to protect my tired eyes.
all.zh: 我安排離開螢幕的午休時間，以保護我疲倦的眼睛。

all.en: A neighbor and I started exchanging short morning greetings during our coffee runs.
all.zh: 我和鄰居開始在買咖啡時互道簡短的早安。

all.en: My productivity actually improved because I could focus without office interruptions.
all.zh: 我的生產力其實提升了，因為沒有辦公室的干擾讓我能專注。

all.en: However, I missed celebrating small wins with my teammates in person.
all.zh: 然而，我懷念與隊友當面慶祝小成就的感覺。

all.en: To stay connected, we started a weekly virtual coffee chat every Friday afternoon.
all.zh: 為了保持聯繫，我們每週五下午開始固定的視訊咖啡聊天。

all.en: I also joined an online fitness class to keep my body active during the workday.
all.zh: 我也參加了線上健身課程，讓身體在工作日仍能保持活躍。

all.en: My manager praised my consistent results during our monthly performance review.
all.zh: 在月度績效檢討時，我的主管稱讚我表現穩定。
